/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/mips_display.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libmips_display.so -o libmips_display.so CMakeFiles/mips_display.dir/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mips_display.dir/MipsDisplay.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSM.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libICE.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libXext.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so
